title: COVID-19 Disability Advisory Group - Canada.ca
content:
## COVID-19 Disability Advisory Group
The COVID-19 Disability Advisory Group was established in April 2020. Members of the Advisory Group are experts from the disability community. The Advisory Group provided advice on a disability inclusive response to the pandemic. The Advisory Group’s tenure was extended beyond the pandemic period. It currently provides advice on disability inclusion and on implementing the mandate of the Minister of Diversity, Inclusion and Persons with Disabilities.
- COVID-19  Disability Advisory Group will continue to help guide Government action on  disability inclusion
- Statement by  Minister Qualtrough on Canada’s Disability-Inclusive approach to its COVID-19  pandemic response
